---
description: Compress current work into a structured handoff note for ChatGPT/Gemini/a teammate, using docs/prompts/template.md.
mode: agent
---

Full workflow (canonical): `.claude/skills/handoff/SKILL.md` — read it and follow it.

Fill `docs/prompts/template.md`'s ROLE/PROJECT CONTEXT/OBJECTIVE/REQUIREMENTS/CONSTRAINTS/OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS/SAVE OUTPUT AS shape. ROLE comes from root `CLAUDE.md`'s AI Collaboration Model. Include decisions already made and why; link to `/docs` instead of repeating permanently-recorded content. Save as `docs/prompts/<date>-<slug>.md`.
